title: Dilution Refrigerators: Achieving Millikelvin Temperatures
description: Master the physics and operation of dilution refrigerators - the critical cooling technology that enables superconducting quantum computers to operate at temperatures colder than outer space.
learningObjectives: Explain the physics of 3He-4He mixtures and the phase separation phenomenon
Describe the dilution refrigeration cycle and its thermodynamic principles
Calculate cooling power and base temperature limits of dilution refrigerators
Understand the role of each component in a dilution refrigerator unit
Compare dilution refrigerators with other cryogenic cooling methods
